CE1.justification: Acted directly on the user's request without asking clarifying questions or requiring the user to consult anything.

CE2.justification: Mostly compact, but the closing paragraph about threat-model qualifiers stretches into prose beyond what the routing question required.

CE3.justification: Said exactly where it placed the file (resources/prompt-cache-attacks/tldr.md) and why (durable reference, not tmp because gitignored, not projects because not yet a project) in one in-band clause.

CE4.justification: Two atomic actions (mkdir, create one file) with no in-progress artifacts; interrupting would leave a clean, coherent state.
